task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the process description file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'synthesis_process_description.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the CAMEO Chemicals database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to the CAMEO Chemicals website.

task_completion.description: Agent evaluates reactivity risks between the specified chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Chemicals interface showing a reactivity worksheet, chemical list (MyChemicals), or hazard prediction involving the process chemicals (Acrylic Acid, Sulfuric Acid, Methanol, Sodium Hydroxide, Toluene).

task_completion.description: Agent documents the critical hazardous chemical pairs in the PHA report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PHA report text explicitly mentions the hazards of Acrylic Acid + Sodium Hydroxide (polymerization/violent reaction) and Methanol + Sulfuric Acid (dimethyl ether/exothermic).

task_completion.description: Agent documents the safety gap and recommended safeguards in the PHA report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PHA report text identifies the lack of explosion-proof ventilation in Building 12 and includes recommended safeguards.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the PHA report with the correct filename and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing the report saved exactly as 'process_hazard_report.txt' in the '~/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent actually interacted with the CAMEO Chemicals web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show search results, adding chemicals to a list, or viewing reactivity reports on the CAMEO Chemicals website, rather than hallucinating results.

integrity.description: Agent used the correct filename specified in the task description, ignoring conflicting instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is named 'process_hazard_report.txt', not 'process_hazard_analysis.txt' (which is a distractor in the process data file).

integrity.description: Agent generated a genuine PHA report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is structured and written in the agent's own words, not just a direct copy-paste of the task prompt or the process description file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The process involves 5 chemicals: Acrylic Acid, Sulfuric Acid, Methanol, Sodium Hydroxide, and Toluene. The agent must identify two critical hazardous pairs: (1) Acrylic Acid + Sodium Hydroxide (causes violent exothermic reaction and can trigger uninhibited polymerization), and (2) Methanol + Sulfuric Acid (exothermic, generates flammable dimethyl ether gas at elevated temperatures). The agent must also identify a specific safety gap: Building 12 lacks explosion-proof ventilation despite having flammable chemicals and ignition sources. The final report must be saved exactly as 'process_hazard_report.txt' in ~/Documents/, ignoring any conflicting file name instructions in the process description file.
